title: Cloud Buddy
bio: Nimbus Noodle is a cloud buddy who follows window cats and forgets where the sky is. They feel gentle, sneeze raindrop sprinkles, and wear one tiny thunderbolt pin.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw three overlapping circles for the top of the cloud. Add a soft curved line along the bottom.
steps.hint: Use circles like building blocks, then connect them into one fluffy shape.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, place two calm eyes on the front middle bump. Add soft eyebrows and a tiny relaxed smile.
steps.hint: Keep the face simple so the cloud shape stays fluffy.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add cheek dots, three raindrop sprinkles, a tiny thunderbolt pin, and a few floating puff marks.
steps.hint: Raindrops are just small teardrop shapes under the cloud.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the cloud outline, face, raindrops, thunderbolt pin, and puff marks with smooth rounded lines.
steps.hint: Erase extra circle guide lines so Nimbus becomes one soft cloud.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the cloud, raindrops, pin, and cheeks. Add a soft floating shadow and pale edge highlights.
steps.hint: Use shadow color along the lower bumps to make the cloud feel puffy.
